en.value: ·       Introductory and programme induction meetings·       Awareness raising and campaigning activities·       Organize school enrollment campaign·       Facilitate to update and improve School Improvement Plan (SIP)·       Promotion of child and adolescent friendly home environment·       Institutional and organizational development of Graduate forums and networks·       Support to develop long term Vision and Action plan of Graduate forums and networks·       ToT to Animators·       Capacity building of animators·       Support to organize Public/ Social audits at Municipality level·       Periodic meeting with stakeholders (linkage and coordination)·       Promotion of savings and credit scheme in SCs·       Awareness raising and capacity building on disabilities·       Partners capacity building·       School Management Committee/ Parent Teachers Association strengthening·       Support in organizing social campaigns and events·       Support construction and rehabilitation of school buildings; water supplies, toilets in the schools·       Technical training on On-farm and off-farm based IGA·       Seeds, agriculture tools and equipment support to start IGAs·       School enrollment support with educational materials and uniform to child from hard core poor families·       Support to establish child and girls’ friendly schools·       Support to establish disability friendly schools·       Support to implement the SIP·       Education/support materials to school to improve school teaching & learning environment·       Vocational training to youths·       Establishment and operation of SAMVAD centers (SCs)·       Formation and mobilization of SAMVAD graduate forums and Networks·       Support Seed money to Graduate networks for initiation of IGA activitiesEmergency fund for disaster response
